declared.title: Weapons of Control, Shields of Impunity: Internet Shutdowns in 2022
declared.selection_rationale: Access Now's #KeepItOn annual shutdown report for 2022 (187+ shutdowns across 35 countries, the highest number of countries ever recorded in a single year). Confirmed live via direct fetch, 2026-07-20 — documents Ethiopia's Tigray shutdown reaching 787+ days by end of 2022 (2+ years continuous), Uganda's Facebook block persisting past its 2021 election into the full 2022 coverage year, and Kenya as a positive counter-example — maintained internet access throughout its August 2022 general election despite a pre-election #KeepItOn warning about platform-blocking risk. Coverage-contribution value: extends this org's trajectory back to 2022, matching the same three-years-of-data reasoning already applied to the Freedom House Kenya/Uganda/Ethiopia/Rwanda 2022-2024 entries, and gives Kenya a genuine before/after pair (2022's clean election vs. later years' disruptions noted in the 2023/2024 reports already in this corpus).
